title: rosa communis var. discreta
intro: Rosa communis var. discreta, commonly known as wild rose, is a low-growing shrub with fragrant flowers and edible fruits. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Rosa communis var. discreta include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make rose hip tea, rose petal jam, or rose oil for skincare and wound care.
